Bash(ssh root@46.224.29.40 "echo '---direct fetch \(no cache bust\)---' && curl -sk -o /tmp/img.jpeg -w 'HTTP %{http_code}  size=%{size_download}  content-type=%{content_type}\\n' https://afianco.app/uploads/products/7faf38c7-fe83-4b66-af56-2b6184a18f74.jpeg && echo '---direct fetch \(cache bust\)---' && curl -sk -o /tmp/img2.jpeg -w 'HTTP %{http_code}  size=%{size_download}  content-type=%{content_type}\\n' 'https://afianco.app/uploads/products/7faf38c7-fe83-4b66-af56-2b6184a18f74.jpeg?t=99999' && echo '---file magic check---' && file /tmp/img.jpeg /tmp/img2.jpeg")
